label: Chat Trigger
description: Receives user messages over HTTP and starts a flow run.

response_mode.title: Response mode
response_mode.description: Streaming returns NDJSON token events as the agent runs; Last node waits and returns the full reply as JSON.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Who may POST chat messages. Org member requires a signed-in DocRouter user; API key and public modes are reserved for a future embed widget.

title.title: Title
title.description: Heading shown in the chat panel and future embed UI. Defaults to the flow name when empty.

subtitle.title: Subtitle
subtitle.description: Optional secondary line under the title in the chat UI.

input_placeholder.title: Input placeholder
input_placeholder.description: Placeholder text in the message input field.

initial_messages.title: Initial messages
initial_messages.description: Newline-separated greeting lines shown before the first user turn in Test chat. Also used as fallback chatInput when running the trigger via manual execute.

allow_file_uploads.title: Allow file uploads
allow_file_uploads.description: Accept file attachments with chat messages (not yet implemented).
